title: Senior Manager, Account Sales
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced Senior Manager, Account Sales to lead strategic customer engagements, strengthen long-term partnerships, and drive sustainable business growth in a collaborative and performance-driven environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Act as the primary point of contact for all commercial, sales, and relationship management matters for assigned accounts.
  • Develop and execute account strategies to achieve sales, revenue, and market share objectives.
  • Manage and grow strategic customer accounts by building strong professional relationships with stakeholders across different organizational levels.
  • Lead commercial activities including contract negotiations, pricing strategy, and order management.
  • Monitor and analyze sales forecasts to ensure alignment with customer growth, expansion, and development plans.
  • Collaborate with customer research and development teams to identify opportunities for new tool adoption in development and pilot environments.
  • Work closely with internal product, engineering, and manufacturing teams to align equipment capabilities with customer technology roadmaps and industry transitions.
  • Support customer engagement through evaluation of new technologies and facilitation of joint development initiatives.
  • Coordinate cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery, resolve technical challenges, and maintain a consistent customer experience.
  • Lead regular business reviews and maintain effective working relationships with customer stakeholders.
  • Use market insights, technology trends, and customer roadmaps to inform strategic planning and execution.
  • Identify and assess new growth opportunities within accounts, including emerging technologies and business segments.
  • Provide accurate and timely business updates and insights to internal leadership and relevant stakeholders.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Materials Science, Chemistry, Physics, Applied Sciences, Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Significant relevant experience in semiconductor capital equipment sales or account management, particularly supporting logic and memory customers.
  • Strong understanding of wafer fabrication processes, including Etch, Deposition, Clean, Wet Process, and Assembly.
  • Experience managing customer engagements across development, pilot, and high-volume manufacturing environments.
  • Demonstrated ability to conduct commercial negotiations and deliver clear presentations to both technical and non-technical audiences.
  • Strong strategic thinking, problem-solving, and analytical skills.
  • Experience working with cross-functional teams in a global or regional organizational context.
  • Effective communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder management skills.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to PERSOLKELLY Singapore Pte Ltd and its local and overseas subsidiaries and affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data to prospective employers/companies based in any country for purposes of evaluating  suitability for employment, conducting reference checks, administering employment related services, complying with Government’s health advisories and such other purposes stated in our Privacy Policy.

Our full Privacy Policy is available at https://www.persolsingapore.com/policies.  If you wish to withdraw your consent, please drop us an email at "sg.dataprotection@persolapac.com" to let us know. Please feel free to contact us if you have any queries.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
